stills.settled-graph: Extreme macro photograph, 16:9, of deep matte black cotton paper filling the entire frame, shot in a dark studio on a 100mm macro lens at f/2.8 with shallow depth of field, the paper plane angled slightly away from the lens so focus falls off softly toward the top edge. Confined to the right third of the frame, a minimal routing diagram is already inked onto the paper in faintly luminous, desaturated deep sage-green ink: thin hand-drawn lines with slightly wavering weight, drawn with a fine drafting pen, branching and merging like a pipeline sketch, connecting six small hollow circular nodes, no arrowheads, no labels, no symbols, no writing. One node glows slightly brighter than the others, as if the ink is still wet and catching the light. The left two thirds and lower half of the frame are near-empty matte black paper, pure negative space, only the faint tooth and fiber texture of the paper catching a single soft key light raking in from the upper left, gentle falloff into deep shadow, subtle natural vignette. Cinematic grade: cool crushed blacks around #0a0b0d, a single desaturated green accent and no other color, fine 35mm film grain, austere, quiet, elegant, abstract still life.
stills.sparse-fallback: Extreme macro photograph, 16:9, of deep matte black cotton paper filling the entire frame, dark studio, 100mm macro lens at f/2.8, shallow depth of field, the paper plane angled slightly away from the lens. From the right edge of the frame a single thin hand-drawn line in faintly luminous desaturated deep sage-green ink enters and splits once into two routes, connecting three small hollow circular nodes in the far right fifth of the frame, slightly wavering line weight from a fine drafting pen, no arrowheads, no labels, no writing. The rest of the frame is empty matte black paper, its fine tooth and fiber texture caught by one soft key light raking from the upper left, deep soft shadow, subtle natural vignette. Cool crushed blacks around #0a0b0d, a single desaturated green accent and no other color, fine 35mm film grain, austere, minimal, elegant abstract still life.
stills.run-invoice: Top-down macro photograph of a single crumpled paper vendor invoice lying slightly rotated on a matte black desk, filling most of the frame, 3:4 portrait. The invoice is a clean printed document that has been handled: soft creases, one dog-eared corner, a faint coffee ring stain on the lower right, a small handwritten annotation in pencil near the total. Printed content, crisp and legible: header 'NORDWIND SUPPLY CO.' with a small generic geometric logo, 'INVOICE #INV-2847' below it, a date line 'DUE: NET 30', a simple table with three line items of industrial supplies with quantities and prices, and at the bottom a bold row 'TOTAL  $48,250.00'. Muted warm paper white, black ink, one thin rubber-stamped rectangle 'RECEIVED' in faded red ink at an angle near the top corner. Lighting: one soft key light raking from the upper left, shallow depth of field toward the very edges, deep soft shadow under the paper edges, fine 35mm film grain, cool crushed blacks around #0a0b0d on the desk, austere, cinematic, photorealistic.

motion: Nearly static macro shot with an extremely slow, constant floating drift, as if the camera is breathing, no push-in, no zoom, no pan. The left two thirds and the lower half of the frame remain completely empty, dark matte black paper for the entire clip: no light, no lines, no glow, nothing enters, crosses, or appears in that area at any moment. The inked diagram in the right third stays exactly as drawn, nothing is added or redrawn, no element appears or disappears. The only motion: a faint pale sage-green glow, the exact same desaturated green as the ink itself, drifts slowly along the already-inked routes between the nodes, staying strictly inside the existing ink lines, always subtle and dim, never any warm color, while the wet-ink node glints gently and the paper fibers shimmer almost imperceptibly under the raking key light. Everything moves at the same calm constant speed from the first frame to the last, and the motion simply continues past the end of the clip with no ending gesture, no camera acceleration, no fade, no zoom out, so the final second matches the first second in composition, brightness, and rhythm. Muted, dark, minimal, cinematic film grain.
negative: text, letters, numbers, words, handwriting, calligraphy, captions, subtitles, watermark, logo, signature, human, hands, fingers, face, new lines being drawn, extra nodes appearing, light entering the frame, glowing beam, light trail, neon, laser, bright glow, orange, amber, ember, copper, gold, warm light, morphing shapes, warping geometry, flicker, strobing, fast motion, camera shake, whip pan, zoom burst, sudden movement at the end, fade to black, plastic look, glossy 3D render, CGI, particle explosion, lens flare, bright colors, oversaturation, blur, low quality
